name: spx-bidding-poller
description: Real-time polling for Agency Booking Bidding List (MVC TypeScript)

scripts.build: rimraf dist && esbuild src/app.ts src/scripts/generate-migration.ts src/scripts/db-migrate.ts src/scripts/db-test.ts src/scripts/smoke-test.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --minify --outdir=dist --packages=external && node scripts/copy-public.mjs
scripts.flow:test: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:test
scripts.flow:start: npm run db:migrate && npm run build --silent && node dist/app.js
